title: cyanus cheiranthifolius
intro: Cyanus cheiranthifolius, also known as Cornflower or Knautia, is a plant species in the flowering plant family Dipsacaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to aid in digestion. The health benefits of Cyanus cheiranthifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and potentially reducing fever. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
